title: Mazhai varum arikuri Lyrics Veppam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Mazhai varum arikuri lyrics Veppam Song Lyrics
#Suzanne #JoshuaSridhar #NaMuthukumar

Mazhai varum arikuri,
en vizhigalil theriyuthe
Manam indru nanaiyuthe,
ithu enna kaadhala ? saadhala?

Pazhagiya kaalangal,
en paarvaiyil viriyuthe
Paadhaigal naluvuthe,
idhu yeno yeno?

Un thoalil saayumbodhu,
urchaagam kollum kangal
Nee engae engae endru
unnai thedi thedi paarkirathu
Unnodu pogum bodhu
poo pookum saalaiyaavum
Nee engae endru ennai
keta pinbu vaadididudhe

Ariyadhoru vayadhil vidhaithathu…
ohooo oh oh ohooo oh
Athuvaagave thaanaai valarnthathu…
ohooo oh
Pudhidhaai oru poovum pookaiyil..
ohooo oh oh ohooo oh
Ada yaaradhai yaaradhai parithatho?
ohooo oh .

Un kaal thadam sendra vazhi
paarthu naanum vandhene
Athu padhiyil tholaindhadhadaa

Naan kettathu azhagiya nerangal
ohooo oh oh ohooo oh
Yaar thanthathu vizhigalil eerangal
ohooo oh
Naan kettathu vaanavil maayangal
ohooo oh oh ohooo oh
Yaar thanthathu vazhigalil kaayangal
ohooo oh

Intha kaadhalum oru vagai
chitravadhaithane
Athu uyirudan erikuthudaa!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Mazhai varum arikuri conveys feelings of love and longing, reflecting on memories and emotions tied to a romantic relationship.

How does this song fit into the movie Veppam?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Veppam, highlighting the emotional struggles of the characters as they navigate their relationships.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Suzanne D'Mello, known for her captivating voice and emotional delivery.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mazhai varum arikuri was composed by Joshua Sridhar, who is recognized for his melodious tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

Mazhai varum arikuri was released on January 27, 2011, as part of the movie Veppam.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mazhai varum arikuri, the listener is taken on a journey through the emotions of love and nostalgia. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of longing, as the protagonist reflects on cherished memories and the complexities of romance. Set against the backdrop of Veppam, it serves as a poignant reminder of the bittersweet nature of relationships. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, this track evokes a deep sense of connection and introspection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhai varum arikuri from Veppam is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With Suzanne D'Mello's enchanting vocals and Joshua Sridhar's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into the lyrical poetry of Na Muthukumar that elevates this track to an emotional masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: The rain is coming, I can feel it in my eyes. My heart is getting soaked today, what kind of love is this? Is it real?
The past times are blooming in my sight. The songs are flowing, what is this all about?
When you sleep in my arms, your eyes sparkle. I keep searching for you everywhere. When I go with you, the path blooms with flowers. After asking where you are, you just smile.
Something unknown has sprouted in this age... oh, oh, oh. Is that how it has grown? ... oh, oh. A new flower blooms in the garden... oh, oh, oh. Who has brought this? ... oh, oh.
I came looking at the path where your feet have touched. Did it get lost on the way?
What I heard were beautiful moments... oh, oh, oh. Who has given those in the eyes? ... oh, oh. What I heard were dreams in the sky... oh, oh, oh. Who has given those in the paths? ... oh, oh.
This love is like a painting. It is alive!
